title: semi-generate the parser
manager: Semi-generate the parser — move part of it from hand-written interpretation toward generated, specialized code — as a P2-workshop performance and maintainability play. A generated parser can be both faster and more faithful to the grammar than a hand-maintained one, at the cost of a generation step; this scopes that tradeoff.
cs: P2 workshop, dual with the reversible-parser line; distinct from precompiling constants (#587)
